innateAbility.name: Armor Power
innateAbility.description: Consumes a Chain Mail in Clockwerk's inventory and grants himself armor bonus.

abilities.name: Battery Assault
abilities.description: Discharges high-powered shrapnel toward one random nearby enemy unit at a time, dealing damage and stunning the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Power Cogs
abilities.description: Forms a barrier of energized cogs around Clockwerk, trapping any units that are near. These Power Cogs can be destroyed by hero attacks.

abilities.name: Rocket Flare
abilities.description: Fires a flare toward an area globally that explodes within the area-targeted radius.

abilities.name: Overclocking
abilities.description: Applies a self-debuff that allows Clockwerk to increase the power of all his abilities' values.Applies a movement speed and attack speed slow once the duration runs out.

abilities.name: Jetpack
abilities.description: Grants unobstructed movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed.However, this self-disarms and severely limits his turn rate.

abilities.name: Hookshot
abilities.description: Fires a rapid grappling device at the point-targeted location. If it latches on a unit, Clockwerk launches himself toward the unit, stunning and dealing damage.
